description: Style Note Casual dressing only gets better with these slip-on sandals from red tape. This pair is a great combination of style and functionality - they're a perfect foundation for building a well-groomed look that exudes style and confidence. Product Details Crisscrossing leather straps covering the forefoot and midfoot for durability and style Padded nubuck footbed Upper stitched to the outsole for durability Durable rubber outsole, curved at the midfoot to offer absolute ergonomic comfort Textured outsole with branching lugs for maximum grip and traction on various surfaces Material and Care Leather Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not store in direct sunlight
